description_long: This house features a whimsical, storybook design with a steeply pitched, red-tiled gable roof and gently curving wooden beams framing the structure. The exterior walls are finished in a textured, off-white plaster with visible weathering, giving it a rustic charm. The front facade includes a small, arched wooden door with a round metal knocker, while the rear and side facades each have a single, square-paned window framed in wood. The roof tiles are arranged in neat, overlapping rows, and the eaves extend slightly beyond the walls, adding to the fairytale aesthetic. The house appears compact, with a single story and no visible porch or steps. Decorative wood trim and the playful curvature of the walls and roof contribute to its unique, fantasy-inspired appearance.
description: A whimsical, single-story house with a steep red-tiled gable roof, curved wooden beams, and rustic plaster walls. Features include a small arched door and square-paned windows, evoking a storybook charm.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red-tiled roof, curved wooden beams, and a single square window beneath the eaves.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steep gable roof, wooden trim, and a square-paned window centered on the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view with the same red-tiled roof and curved beams, but no windows or doors visible.
description_view_3: Front entry view featuring the arched wooden door with a round knocker, steep gable roof, and decorative wood trim.
attribute_entryway_design: Small arched wooden door with a round metal knocker, no steps or porch, framed by curved wooden beams.
